title: atomwrite get subcommand output
description: Result of `atomwrite get` — reads a value at a dotted path in a structured config file (TOML/JSON).

path.description: Absolute path to the config file.

key_path.description: Dotted path that was looked up.

value.description: Value as a TOML/JSON string. `null` when the key was not found.

found.description: True if the key existed; `value` will be non-null.

format.description: Source config format detected from extension.

elapsed_ms.description: Wall-clock time for the operation in milliseconds.
